goal: Create the first internal namespace package for the lab hook surface and route internal callers through it without changing the external CLI or manifest contract.
constraints: Do not move implementation files yet
Preserve the current external hook contract
behavioral_changes: The repo now has an internal namespace package for the lab hook surface.
CLI and selected internal consumers now depend on the hook surface namespace instead of direct top-level hook-module imports.
The external hook contract remains unchanged.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import chip_labs.cli, chip_labs.scaffold, chip_labs.loop_controller; from chip_labs.lab_hooks import run_evaluate"
follow_up: Move hook implementation files behind the namespace only after internal callers are consistently routed through it.
Repeat the same compatibility-first pattern for the other repo surfaces.
